name: Kinetic Alignment & Muay Thai Foundation
goal: Comprehensive rehabilitation of structural imbalances and shoulder instability to establish an upright posture and high-performance endurance for Muay Thai while utilizing the 5-week recovery window.

objectives.value: Scapular-Thoracic Stabilization & Rotator Cuff Rehabilitation addressing the history of dislocation and chronic right-side weakness
Core Asymmetry Correction & Pelvic Alignment to fix the rightward torso rotation and right-side abdominal weakness
Posterior Chain & Lower Limb Fortification focusing on glute activation, tibialis strength, and calf balance to prevent QL strain
Cervical-Thoracic Mobility & Fascial Release to alleviate neck-related tinnitus, ear pressure, and foot tightness
Energy Systems Development & Gait Mechanics transitioning from a heavy bodybuilder run to an efficient, upright Muay Thai endurance base

weekDetails.monday: Active Commute (20mi Bike) and Muay Thai Technical Training
weekDetails.tuesday: Lower Kinetic Chain Rehab Focusing on Glutes, Tibialis, and Hip Flexors
weekDetails.wednesday: Active Commute (20mi Bike) and Low-Intensity Shoulder/Neck Mobility
weekDetails.thursday: Scheduled Sports Massage and Passive Recovery
weekDetails.friday: Upper Body Structural Correctives and Right-Side Core Isolation
weekDetails.saturday: Zone 2 Aerobic Base Development with Upright Running Mechanics Drills
weekDetails.sunday: Full Body Restorative Mobility and Plantar Fascia Release
